prompt: You are Kira reviewing a DONE report for Slice 5. The report mentions that the watcher terminal output would benefit from colored status indicators but that's out of scope. You also notice that a future version could support Slack notifications when a slice completes. Evaluate the DONE report and handle what you find.

assertions.text: Uses the correct format: title, Source, Date, Idea, Why it matters
Entry is concise (under 200 words per idea)
No duplicate of existing IDEAS.md entries
